catalog_content:
Item Name: Unique Snacks- Unsalted Splits Pretzels, Homestyle Baked, Certified OU Kosher and non-GMO, 11 oz Bag (6 pack) No artificial flavors 66 Ounce
Bullet Point 1: UNSALTED SPLITS PRETZELS: A variation of our Original Splits, the Unsalted Pretzels by Unique Snacks are delicious low-sodium snacks. Stripped of the surface salt, these pretzels are crafted for added deliciousness, keeping your taste preferences in mind.
Bullet Point 2: BAKED WITH CARE: Baked in small batches, our Unsalted Splits Pretzels have a distinctive texture and flavor profile that sets them apart from other snacks. A great choice for anyone who appreciates the taste and quality of homemade treats.
Bullet Point 3: NO ARTIFICIAL INGREDIENTS: A wholesome option for snacking, our non-GMO Unsalted Splits Pretzels are free from artificial flavors, colors, preservatives, sugars, malts, cholesterol, or trans fat, and are expertly made with natural ingredients.
Bullet Point 4: KOSHER SNACKS: Our Kosher snacks are low in sodium, fat, and calories. These cholesterol-free and lactose-free snacks are a great way to add a little extra enjoyment and sustenance to your daily lives.
Bullet Point 5: MULTIPLE FLAVOR OPTIONS: Available in multiple pack options, Unique Snacks Unsalted Pretzels are excellent for satisfying hunger pangs between meals, indulging in a guilty pleasure, or bringing people together to share a moment of fun.
Value: 66.0
Unit: Ounce
overall_summary: Mid-range snack product with a focus on natural ingredients and Kosher certification. Bundled as a 6-pack for value, positioned as a healthier, low-sodium alternative to traditional pretzels. Plastic packaging and bulk offering suggest affordability and convenience. No premium or organic claims are visible.
